name: protegrity-data-protection
description: Customer-friendly Protegrity AI Developer Edition workflows for Cursor. Discover, redact, protect, scan, generate synthetic data, and anonymize without MCP.
longDescription: This plugin helps Cursor users complete Protegrity Developer Edition tasks in a guided, customer-driven way. It focuses on the features new users need most: data discovery, redaction, tokenization protection, semantic guardrails, synthetic data, and anonymization. It avoids MCP and keeps the workflow simple with only the prerequisites required for the selected feature.
